data.name: Error_InvalidClient
data.value: The selected client does not exist.

data.name: Error_ConflictOpposite
data.value: Conflict: a {0} rule already exists for '{1}' on client {2}. Delete it before creating an opposite rule.

data.name: Error_ConflictDuplicate
data.value: Duplicate: an identical rule already exists for '{0}' on client {1}.

data.name: Error_ProfileConflictDuplicate
data.value: Duplicate: the profile assigned to this device already has an identical rule for '{0}'.

data.name: Warning_ProfileConflict
data.value: Profile conflict: profile '{0}' has a deny rule for '{1}'. In OPNsense, deny always takes priority; this allow rule will have no effect.

data.name: Warning_ProfileHasDenyRule
data.value: Warning: profile '{0}' has a deny rule for '{1}'. The profile rule (most restrictive) will apply — this allow rule will have no effect as long as the profile rule exists.
